known_gaps: Admin frontend cannot be verified until the pinned frontend/webspa-admin commit is available from the configured submodule remote, the gitlink is repointed after review, or the gitlink strategy is replaced.

Runtime compose smoke now reaches app startup with temporary isolated Docker auth; real env/provider values are still required after acquisition-api schema bootstrap, notification-worker DB SSL, and postback-dispatcher DB host blockers are fixed.

The original worktree is based on local main; merging origin/main produced add/add conflicts and was aborted. A clean PR branch was created from origin/main and the verified repair commit was cherry-picked there.
Dependency vulnerability remediation remains approval-gated because npm audit proposes a breaking Next/PostCSS upgrade.

TMP-030 fixed acquisition-api compose image build and advanced runtime smoke to app startup, where acquisition-api schema bootstrap, notification-worker DB SSL, and postback-dispatcher DB host blockers remain.
risk_notes: Do not run broad dependency updates or vendor rewrites without approval.
summary: Release verification matrix completed and blocked items are documented.
